sections.text: L'epreuve comporte trois parties independantes A, B et C
sections.en: The exam consists of three independent parts A, B and C.

sections.title: A- ACTIVITES NUMERIQUES
sections.en: A – NUMERICAL ACTIVITIES

sections.text: Cette partie comporte quatre exercices independants I, II, III et IV
sections.en: This part includes four independent exercises I, II, III and IV.

sections.title: I
sections.en: I

sections.text: On donne $A=\sqrt{3}+2\sqrt{123}$. Une seule des ecritures suivantes est vraie. Recopiez son numero sur votre feuille de composition. 1 pt
sections.en: We are given $A=\sqrt{3}+2\sqrt{123}$. Only one of the following expressions is true. Copy its number onto your answer sheet. 1 pt

sections.title: II
sections.en: II
We are given $p(x)=25x^2-81$ and $q(x)=x^2+14x+49$.

sections.text: 1. Factoriser $p(x)$ et $q(x)$. 1 pt
sections.en: 1. Factorize $p(x)$ and $q(x)$. 1 pt

sections.text: 2. Resoudre dans $\mathbb{R}$ : $(x+3)(x-5)=0$ et $(x+4)^2=0$. 1 pt
sections.en: 2. Solve in $\mathbb{R}$: $(x+3)(x-5)=0$ and $(x+4)^2=0$. 1 pt

sections.title: III
sections.en: III

sections.text: Resoudre dans $\mathbb{R}^2$ le systeme suivant : $\begin{cases}x+y=12\\x-2y=-3\end{cases}$.
sections.en: Solve in $\mathbb{R}^2$ the following system: $\begin{cases}x+y=12\\x-2y=-3\end{cases}$.

sections.text: Deux villages A et B ont produit ensemble 12 tonnes de feves de cacao. Si on ajoute 3 tonnes de feves a la production de A, on obtient le double de la production de B. Calculer, en tonnes, la production de chacun des deux villages. 1 pt
sections.en: Two villages A and B together produced 12 tons of cocoa beans. If 3 tons are added to village A's production, it becomes twice village B's production. Calculate, in tons, the production of each of the two villages. 1 pt

sections.title: IV
sections.en: IV

sections.text: Le diagramme ci-contre presente les notes des eleves d'une classe de 3eme en mathematiques a l'issue d'un test.
sections.en: The adjacent chart shows the mathematics test scores of students in a 3rd-year class.

sections.text: Diagramme de l'exercice IV
sections.en: Chart for exercise IV

sections.text: 1. Recopier et completer le tableau statistique suivant : 2,5 pts
sections.en: 1. Copy and complete the following statistical table: 2.5 pts

sections.text: $\begin{array}{|c|c|c|c|c|}\hline\text{Note} & 3 & 6 & 12 & 15\\ \hline\text{Effectifs} & 2 & 9 & 1 & 3\\ \hline\end{array}$
sections.en: $\begin{array}{|c|c|c|c|c|}\hline\text{Score} & 3 & 6 & 12 & 15\\ \hline\text{Frequencies} & 2 & 9 & 1 & 3\\ \hline\end{array}$

sections.title: B- ACTIVITES GEOMETRIQUES
sections.en: B – GEOMETRICAL ACTIVITIES

sections.text: Cette partie comporte trois exercices independants I, II et III.
sections.en: This part includes three independent exercises I, II and III.

sections.title: I
sections.en: I

sections.text: Soit un losange $ABCD$ de $3$ cm de cote.
sections.en: Let $ABCD$ be a rhombus with side length $3$ cm.

sections.text: 1. Construire $ABCD$. 1 pt
sections.en: 1. Construct $ABCD$. 1 pt

sections.text: 2. Construire l'image $ABCD$ par la translation de vecteur $\overrightarrow{AB}$. 1 pt
sections.en: 2. Construct the image of $ABCD$ under the translation with vector $\overrightarrow{AB}$. 1 pt

sections.title: II
sections.en: II

sections.text: Un cone de revolution a une generatrice de $20$ cm ; le rayon de sa base est $12$ cm et on note $h$ sa hauteur.
sections.en: A cone of revolution has a slant height of $20$ cm; the radius of its base is $12$ cm, and $h$ denotes its height.

sections.text: 1. a. Montrer que $h=16$ cm. 0,5 pt
sections.en: 1. a) Show that $h=16$ cm. 0.5 pt

sections.text: b. Calculer le volume de ce cone. 0,5 pt
sections.en: b) Calculate the volume of this cone. 0.5 pt

sections.text: 2. On coupe ce cone par un plan parallele a sa base. On obtient un petit cone de hauteur $4$ cm. Soit $r_1$ le rayon de la base du petit cone.
sections.en: 2. This cone is cut by a plane parallel to its base. We obtain a small cone of height $4$ cm. Let $r_1$ be the radius of the base of the small cone.

sections.text: a. Demontrer que $r_1=3$ cm. 0,75 pt
sections.en: a) Prove that $r_1=3$ cm. 0.75 pt

sections.text: b. Calculer le volume du petit cone. 0,75 pt
sections.en: b) Calculate the volume of the small cone. 0.75 pt

sections.title: III
sections.en: III

sections.text: Sur la figure ci-dessous, $ABCD$ et $EGFH$ sont des carres de centre $O$. $(\Gamma)$ est le cercle de centre $O$ et de diametre $EF$.
sections.en: In the figure below, $ABCD$ and $EGFH$ are squares with center $O$. $(\Gamma)$ is the circle with center $O$ and diameter $EF$.

sections.text: La rotation $R$ de centre $O$ et d'angle $45^\circ$ transforme $F$ en $L$ et on note : $R(F)=L$.
sections.en: The rotation $R$ with center $O$ and angle $45^\circ$ maps $F$ to $L$, and we write: $R(F)=L$.

sections.text: 1. Recopier et completer le tableau suivant : 1 pt
sections.en: 1. Copy and complete the following table: 1 pt

sections.text: $\begin{array}{|c|c|c|c|c|}\hline R(F) & R(M) & R(H) & R(K) & R(G)\\ \hline L &  &  &  & \\ \hline\end{array}$
sections.en: $\begin{array}{|c|c|c|c|c|}\hline R(F) & R(M) & R(H) & R(K) & R(G)\\ \hline L &  &  &  & \\ \hline\end{array}$

sections.text: 2. Quelle est la mesure en degre de l'angle $FHG$ ? Justifier votre reponse. 1 pt
sections.en: 2. What is the measure (in degrees) of angle $FHG$? Justify your answer. 1 pt

sections.text: Figure de l'exercice III
sections.en: Figure for exercise III

sections.title: C- PROBLEME
sections.en: C – PROBLEM

sections.text: Le plan est muni d'un repere orthonorme $(O,I,J)$. On donne les points $A(2;-1)$ ; $B(-2;3)$ ; $C(0;3)$ ; $D(-2;0)$.
sections.en: The plane is equipped with an orthonormal coordinate system $(O,I,J)$. We are given points $A(2;-1)$, $B(-2;3)$, $C(0;3)$, $D(-2;0)$.

sections.text: 1. Placer ces points dans le plan. 1 pt
sections.en: 1. Plot these points in the plane. 1 pt

sections.text: 2. Ecrire une equation cartesienne de la droite $(AB)$. 1 pt
sections.en: 2. Write a Cartesian equation of the line $(AB)$. 1 pt

sections.text: 3. Determiner les coordonnees des points $I$, $J$, $K$ et $L$, milieux respectifs des segments $[BC]$, $[BD]$, $[DA]$ et $[AC]$. 2 pts
sections.en: 3. Determine the coordinates of points $I$, $J$, $K$ and $L$, the midpoints of segments $[BC]$, $[BD]$, $[DA]$ and $[AC]$ respectively. 2 pts

sections.text: 4. Demontrer que le quadrilatere $IJKL$ est un parallelogramme. 2 pts
sections.en: 4. Prove that quadrilateral $IJKL$ is a parallelogram. 2 pts

sections.text: 5. L'unite de longueur etant le centimetre, calculer le perimetre du quadrilatere $ABCD$. 1 pt
sections.en: 5. Since the unit of length is the centimeter, calculate the perimeter of quadrilateral $ABCD$. 1 pt
